Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, Record ->> '$.CTYA.CTYACore.CTYACoreDiagnosis.CTYACoreDiagnosisAdditionalItems.FamilialCancerSyndromeIndicator.@code' as FamilialCancerSyndromeIndicator from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'CT' and NhsNumber is not null and FamilialCancerSyndromeIndicator is not null and DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed is not null;

Explanation.Description: The date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was clinically agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: Indicates whether there is a possible or confirmed familial cancer syndrome during a Cancer Care Spell.
